sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Equinix stock rating upgraded to Outperform by BMO Capital on growth outlook
feed.summary: BMO Capital upgraded Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) from Market Perform to Outperform, setting a price target of $900.00, indicating a potential 24% upside. The upgrade is based on compelling risk/reward, despite disappointment following the company’s June Analyst Day outlook, with positive factors including bookings momentum, margin expansion focus, accelerated development timelines, and lower interest rates supporting the outlook. Equinix has also seen recent corporate developments, including the conclusion of a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission investigation without enforcement action and key executive appointments.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp to Speak at the Goldman Sachs U.S. Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp announced that CEO Gunjan Kedia and CFO John Stern will present at the Goldman Sachs U.S. Financial Services Conference on Wednesday, December 10, at 9:20 a.m. ET in New York. A live audio webcast and replay will be available on the U.S. Bank Investor Relations website. U.S. Bancorp, headquartered in Minneapolis, is the parent company of U.S. Bank National Association, with approximately 70,000 employees and $695 billion in assets as of September 30, 2025.

feed.title: Johnson Controls Reports Growth in Q4 and FY25 Results, Sets Positive FY26 Outlook
feed.summary: Johnson Controls reported significant growth in Q4 and full-year FY25 sales, with organic sales increasing by 4% and 6% respectively. The company also saw a strong rise in orders and an expanded backlog of $14.9 billion organically, demonstrating robust operational performance. An analyst has rated JCI stock as a Buy with a $142.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark classifies it as Outperform due to strong earnings and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Darktrace named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Email Security Platforms
feed.summary: Darktrace has been recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Email Security Platforms, following its recognition as a Customers’ Choice in the 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Email Security. The company attributes this recognition to its innovation in AI-native detection and response, exceptional customer experiences, and its ability to seamlessly integrate with existing security ecosystems and partners like Microsoft. Darktrace encourages readers to review the report to understand its impact on the email security market.

feed.title: Can Newmont's Record Free Cash Flow Momentum Carry Into Q4?
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation logged a record quarterly free cash flow of $1.6 billion in Q3 2025, driven by increased operating activities, but faces potential declines in Q4 due to specific spending and payments. Despite short-term pressures, the company's strong balance sheet is expected to support growth and shareholder value. Peers like Barrick Mining Corporation and Agnico Eagle Mines Limited also reported significant free cash flow increases in the same period.

feed.title: Stocks With Rising Relative Strength: Southwest Airlines
feed.summary: This article focuses on Southwest Airlines (LUV) as a stock exhibiting rising relative strength, and discusses its recent performance and technical indicators. It notes that LUV crossed above its 50-day moving average and its Relative Strength (RS) Rating has improved. The article also provides key financial metrics including its EPS Rank and A/D Rating.

feed.title: Terray Therapeutics Achieves AI-Enabled Drug Discovery Milestone in Collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb
feed.summary: Terray Therapeutics announced achieving a drug discovery milestone in its collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb. This success highlights the power of Terray's EMMI platform, which integrates AI with a vast target-ligand binding database and automated lab processes to discover and optimize novel molecules for difficult-to-drug targets. The collaboration aims to accelerate small molecule drug discovery for areas with significant unmet medical needs.

feed.title: Supabase and AWS Empower App Developers to Build in a Weekend, Scale to Millions
feed.summary: Supabase and AWS announced new Amazon S3-based storage innovations and an ETL feature to simplify building generative AI apps. These tools, including Supabase Analytics Buckets and Supabase Vector Buckets, along with automated ETL, allow developers to scale apps from prototype to production for millions of users without significant rebuilds. The collaboration aims to make data integration and AI feature implementation easier for businesses, leveraging AWS's global infrastructure and Supabase's Postgres-based platform.

feed.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: Lam Research, Sweetgreen, Applied Materials, Lattice Semiconductor, and The Pennant Group
feed.summary: This article highlights several stocks that experienced significant positive movement yesterday, including Lam Research, Sweetgreen, Applied Materials, Lattice Semiconductor, and The Pennant Group. Each company saw a rise in stock value due to various factors such as analyst upgrades, price target increases, or company expansion announcements. The piece details the specific reasons behind each stock's performance, providing financial figures and analyst insights.

feed.title: (CPAY) Movement as an Input in Quant Signal Sets
feed.summary: This article analyzes Fleetcor Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: CPAY) using AI-generated quantitative signals, highlighting a strong near and mid-term sentiment but a weak long-term outlook. It details specific trading strategies (Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, Risk Hedging) with entry, target, and stop-loss levels. The report also provides multi-timeframe signal analysis indicating support and resistance levels for various periods.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines introduces possibly costly new policy for plus-size travellers
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines is implementing a new policy for plus-size travelers starting January 27, 2026, which will likely increase costs. Travelers needing two seats will now be required to purchase an extra ticket in advance, with no guarantee of a refund if the flight is full. This change marks a significant departure from their previous customer-friendly policy, which offered refunds or free second seats at the airport.

feed.title: Citizens Finanicial Group unveils AI software plan to aid with banking services
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group Chairman and CEO Bruce Van Saun discussed the company's growth and potential banking consolidation. He also elaborated on how artificial intelligence can propel the company forward in banking services. This discussion took place on 'Mornings with Maria'.

feed.title: BlackRock's 2026 AI Report Is Bullish on Digital Assets, Bearish on U.S. Economy
feed.summary: BlackRock's 2026 AI report projects a bullish future for institutional crypto adoption due to the U.S. economy's fragility and increasing government debt, which will push traditional hedges to fail. The report highlights tokenization and stablecoins as key bridges between traditional finance and the digital economy, anticipating significant crypto gains driven by institutional inflows, exemplified by BlackRock's own Bitcoin ETF allocations. This shift is also supported by the increasing demand for high-performance computing for AI, benefiting bitcoin miners capable of leasing data center capacity.

feed.title: Made4net Recognized in the 2025 Midmarket Context: Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Warehouse Management Systems
feed.summary: Made4net, a global leader in WMS and supply chain execution software, announced its inclusion as one of 19 Notable Vendors in the 2025 Midmarket Context: Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Warehouse Management Systems report. The company is also one of five vendors recognized in both the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Warehouse Management Systems and the Midmarket Context, highlighting its commitment to providing advanced WMS solutions for midsize enterprises. Made4net believes this recognition, along with customer feedback, underscores the agility, extensibility, and fast time-to-value of its WarehouseExpert™ WMS, which is purpose-built for midmarket needs.

feed.title: Citi Hires Deal Veteran To Lead Health And Beauty Push
feed.summary: Citigroup has hired Kelly McPhilliamy, a seasoned banker with over 25 years of experience, to lead its new health and beauty investment banking group. This strategic move coincides with a surge in large beauty and consumer health deals, prompting Citi to sharpen its focus on this increasingly active sector. The article highlights how these multi-billion-dollar deals, ranging from celebrity-backed brands to consumer health staples, are reshaping the industry and offer significant opportunities for banks involved in advisory and financing.

feed.title: PlainID Named a Representative Provider in the 2025 Gartner® Innovation Insight: Authorization Management Platforms Report
feed.summary: PlainID has been recognized as a Representative Provider in Gartner's first-ever Innovation Insight: Authorization Management Platforms report. This inclusion highlights the growing importance of Authorization Management Platforms (AMPs) in enterprise security, especially as traditional authorization models struggle to keep pace with modern architectures and the increasing role of AI. PlainID's policy-based authorization solutions are presented as key to strengthening security, improving compliance, and increasing operational efficiency by providing dynamic access-policy control.

feed.title: ADP Says US Payrolls in Nov. Fell by 32,000
feed.summary: US private-sector payrolls unexpectedly fell by 32,000 in November, marking the largest decline since early 2023, according to ADP data. This unexpected drop, contrary to economists' expectations of a 10,000 job gain, signals a potentially more significant weakening in the labor market and could influence monetary policy decisions.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: XPO (XPO), Northrop Grumman (NOC) and Quanta Services (PWR)
feed.summary: This article highlights bullish sentiments from financial analysts regarding three industrial goods companies: XPO, Northrop Grumman, and Quanta Services. Analysts from BMO Capital, Bank of America Securities, and Roth MKM have issued Buy ratings and provided price targets for these stocks, indicating potential upside from current levels. The report details the specific analyst ratings, price targets, and their professional track records.

feed.title: Ex-Dividend Reminder: Mueller Industries, Waste Management and Hub Group
feed.summary: Mueller Industries (MLI), Waste Management (WM), and Hub Group (HUBG) are scheduled to trade ex-dividend on December 5, 2025, for their upcoming quarterly dividends. These companies will pay dividends of $0.25, $0.825, and $0.125 respectively, with payment dates in mid-December. The article details the expected stock price adjustments post-ex-dividend and provides historical dividend insights for investors.

feed.title: PNC plans the most new branches in these cities, reveals yearly rollout counts
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group Inc. has significantly increased its new branch build plans, aiming for 300 new branches by 2030 with an investment of $2 billion. Miami continues to be a top target for new branches, but the plan also includes new regions and an accelerated annual rollout pace. This marks the second upward revision of PNC's branch expansion strategy since early 2024.

feed.title: Dollar Tree, Inc. Reports Results for the Third Quarter Fiscal 2025
feed.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. reported strong third-quarter fiscal 2025 results, with same-store net sales increasing by 4.2% and diluted EPS from continuing operations at $1.20. The company completed $1.5 billion in share repurchases year-to-date and raised its full-year fiscal 2025 adjusted EPS forecast to $5.60 to $5.80, reflecting strong performance driven by its multi-price strategy.

feed.title: The Live Nation litigation minefield: lessons from a legal crossroads for the live entertainment industry and beyond
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment faces a confluence of legal challenges, including a class action lawsuit and antitrust suits from the DOJ and FTC, which could significantly reshape the live entertainment industry. These cases scrutinize mass arbitration clauses, exclusive venue contracts, and vertically integrated platforms, pushing for greater competition and consumer protection. The outcome will likely impact not only Live Nation but also other industries that rely on similar business practices, urging companies to re-evaluate their contracts and pricing models.

feed.title: Should You Continue to Hold RMD Stock in Your Portfolio?
feed.summary: ResMed (RMD) is experiencing strong demand for its mask portfolio and expanding its Residential Care Software business through strategic acquisitions. The company is actively focusing on international market expansion, which is showing promising growth. However, macroeconomic challenges and intense competition pose potential headwinds for its operations.

feed.title: Dollar General Q3 Earnings Preview: Remodels and Margins in Focus
feed.summary: Dollar General (DG) is set to release its Q3 fiscal 2025 earnings on Dec. 4, with investors keenly watching customer traffic, same-store sales, inventory, and margins. The company is expected to report revenue growth of 4.2% to $10.61 billion and earnings per share of 92 cents, a 3.4% increase. Factors like remodels, improved inventory management, digital initiatives, and margin-driving efforts are expected to contribute to an earnings beat, despite potential headwinds from SG&A pressure and a shift towards lower-margin consumables.

feed.title: Ex-Dividend Reminder: Union Pacific, Exponent and ICF International
feed.summary: This article serves as an ex-dividend reminder for Union Pacific Corp (UNP), Exponent Inc. (EXPO), and ICF International Inc (ICFI), all of which will trade ex-dividend on December 5, 2025. It details the upcoming dividend payments for each company, their respective dividend yields based on current stock prices, and provides historical dividend stability information. The piece also notes the current stock performance of these companies on the day of publication.

feed.title: EquipmentShare (WFC) seals $2.75 billion credit facility with Wells Fargo to 2030
feed.summary: EquipmentShare has secured a new $2.75 billion asset-based senior secured credit facility with Wells Fargo as the administrative agent and lead lender. This facility, which extends maturity to 2030, aims to strengthen EquipmentShare's financial foundation, reduce costs, and provide flexibility for organic growth. The agreement solidifies their capital structure and supports further investment in their T3® technology platform.

feed.title: Simon (NYSE: SPG) and Electrify America top 500+ Hyper-Fast EV chargers, power 549+ million EV miles
feed.summary: Electrify America and Simon (NYSE: SPG) announced a significant milestone in their collaboration, surpassing 500 Hyper-Fast chargers across 105 stations at Simon properties in 27 states and two Canadian provinces. This partnership has powered over 549 million EV miles and dispensed more than 189 kilowatt-hours of energy since its launch. The initiative aims to provide convenient, high-speed EV charging integrated with retail, dining, and entertainment, enhancing the customer experience and supporting the transition to electric mobility.

feed.title: Price Over Earnings Overview: Labcorp Hldgs
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of Labcorp Hldgs' (NYSE: LH) Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio. It details the current stock price and its performance over the last month and year, comparing Labcorp's P/E to the industry average to determine potential undervaluation or overvaluation. The article emphasizes that while the P/E ratio is a useful metric, it has limitations and should be used with other financial and qualitative analyses.

feed.title: How Is United Rentals' Stock Performance Compared to Other Industrials Stocks?
feed.summary: United Rentals (URI) has underperformed the Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLI) and its competitor AerCap Holdings N.V. (AER) over recent periods, despite beating Q3 2025 revenue expectations. The stock experienced a decline and weakened investor sentiment due to inflation, elevated interest rates, and rising operating costs impacting profitability. Analysts, however, maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for URI with a significant upside potential to their price target.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: XPO (XPO), Northrop Grumman (NOC) and Quanta Services (PWR)
feed.summary: Analysts from BMO Capital and Bank of America Securities have issued bullish ratings for XPO, Northrop Grumman, and Quanta Services in the Industrial Goods sector. XPO received a Buy rating with a $168 price target and a Strong Buy consensus, while Northrop Grumman was maintained at Buy with a Strong Buy consensus and a $690.82 average price target. Quanta Services also received a Buy rating, with a Moderate Buy consensus and a $481.54 price target.

feed.title: Philip Morris International Expands its Partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP, Launching a Bold New Chapter in Their Long-Standing Relationship
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (PMI) announced an expanded partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP and Ferrari Challenge Trofeo Pirelli, introducing its ZYN nicotine pouch brand to Scuderia Ferrari HP Formula 1 liveries at select races, starting with the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix 2025. This collaboration, spanning over five decades, reinforces innovation and shared values, aiming to accelerate the replacement of cigarettes. PMI emphasizes responsible marketing, targeting adult consumers with smoke-free alternatives, and highlights ZYN's global leadership and FDA authorization in the U.S.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: XPO (XPO), Northrop Grumman (NOC) and Quanta Services (PWR)
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of recent analyst ratings for three industrial goods companies: XPO, Northrop Grumman, and Quanta Services. Analysts from BMO Capital and Rothschild & Co Redburn issued Buy ratings for XPO, while Bank of America Securities analysts maintained Buy ratings for both Northrop Grumman and Quanta Services. The report highlights price targets, average returns of the analysts, and current analyst consensus for each stock.

feed.title: HCA’s Cash Machine Looks Cheap After A Healthy Run
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, the largest for-profit hospital operator in the U.S., has shown strong recent performance with a 56.6% total return over 12 months and raised full-year guidance for 2025. Despite policy risks and labor cost inflation, its robust cash generation, strong margins, and perceived valuation discount make it an appealing opportunity for long-term investors, though the stock carries risks associated with leverage and regulatory uncertainty.

feed.title: Coca-Cola eyes return of bolt-on deals, but is there a viable pipeline?
feed.summary: Coca-Cola CEO James Quincey expects bolt-on acquisitions to become a significant strategy again, but timing depends on the innovation cycle, with a potential wait until 2027 due to a thin pipeline of acquisition-ready brands emerging from the pandemic and an ongoing IRS dispute impacting available capital. Despite these challenges, the company remains opportunistic for suitable bolt-on deals.

feed.title: Microsoft Stock Falls After Software Giant Reportedly Revises AI Sales Targets As Growth Falls Short Of Expectation
feed.summary: Microsoft's stock fell over 2% after The Information reported that the tech giant revised its AI sales targets. Less than 20% of employees in the Azure cloud division met their projected Foundry sales growth for the fiscal year ending June, leading to scaled-back expectations for AI offerings. Microsoft had implemented new benchmarks in July, aiming for a 25% growth goal for AI products for fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: Teradyne stock hits all-time high at 191.98 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Teradyne Inc. (TER) stock reached an all-time high of $191.98, reflecting strong investor confidence and robust market performance with a 65.21% increase over the past year and a 133.61% surge in the last six months. The company's growth is driven by advancements in technology and automation solutions, and analysts have issued multiple upgrades and increased price targets due to its performance and prospects in the AI testing market. Teradyne also announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share.

feed.title: Walmart and Coca-Cola see tariff pressures cresting, but growing consumer divide requires strategic marketing shift
feed.summary: Walmart and Coca-Cola are adapting their strategies to ongoing tariff pressures, recognizing a growing divide between high- and low-income consumers. Both companies are focusing on strategic pricing and consumer segmentation to navigate changing shopper behavior and maintain market share, with Walmart playing "offense" by selectively absorbing costs. They anticipate tariff impacts to peak soon, but the long-term effects on consumer spending remain a concern.

feed.title: Prudential Financial Announces Matt Armas as Chief Investment Officer
feed.summary: Prudential Financial has appointed Matthew Armas as its new Senior Vice President and Chief Investment Officer, effective March 12, 2026. Armas, previously global co-head of insurance at Goldman Sachs Asset Management, will succeed Timothy L. Schmidt, who is set to retire. Schmidt will remain in an advisory role until August 31, 2026, to ensure a smooth transition.

feed.title: CobbleStone Software Recognized in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Contract Life Cycle Management
feed.summary: CobbleStone Software has been recognized in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Contract Life Cycle Management. The company attributes this recognition to its strong execution, flexible deployment options, and commitment to AI-driven innovation through its flagship product, CobbleStone Contract Insight®. Key strengths highlighted include flexible deployment, intelligent contract automation with AI agents, ease of use, configurability, and a mobile app for on-the-go contract management.

feed.title: Why I Closed My Venture X Business for the Amex Business Platinum Card
feed.summary: The author details why they switched from the Capital One Venture X Business Card to the Amex Business Platinum Card, citing the high annual fees of holding both premium business cards. The decision was driven by factors such as lounge access, specific credit benefits, and better alignment with travel and spending patterns. The Amex Business Platinum Card's enhanced 2x earning rate on large purchases and broader lounge network ultimately made it the more suitable option for their business needs.

feed.title: Delta Air flags $200 million profit hit from US government shutdown
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines anticipates a $200 million hit to its fourth-quarter pre-tax profit due to the recent US government shutdown, translating to about 25 cents per share. Despite the negative impact, the airline noted that growth in travel bookings has recovered to initial expectations post-shutdown and demand for the December quarter remains healthy. JetBlue also flagged operational performance impact from the shutdown and Hurricane Melissa.

feed.title: EXPEDIA LAUNCHES SHOPPABLE SET-JETTING TRAVEL HUB TO TURN ON-SCREEN SCENES INTO REAL-LIFE ITINERARIES
feed.summary: Expedia has launched a new shoppable "Set-Jetting" travel hub, capitalizing on the trend of travelers booking trips inspired by TV shows and movies. The hub offers curated hotels, activities, and flights to destinations featured in popular media, as well as locations where cast members stayed during filming. This initiative aims to turn "watchlist wanderlust into real trips" for a growing number of travelers, particularly Gen Z and Millennials.

feed.title: Dollar Tree (DLTR) Q3 2025 Earnings: Key financials and quarterly highlights
feed.summary: Dollar Tree (DLTR) reported strong Q3 2025 earnings, with net sales increasing 9.4% year-over-year to $4.75 billion and adjusted EPS growing 12% to $1.21, both surpassing estimates. The company also provided an optimistic outlook for Q4 2025 and updated its full fiscal year 2025 projections, leading to a premarket stock gain of over 2%.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Shares Surge 34.5% YTD: Buy Now or Wait?
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's shares have surged 34.5% year-to-date, driven by a rebound in global M&As and the company's strategic shift to wealth and asset management. Analysts are bullish on the stock due to these growth drivers and a strong balance sheet, despite a stretched valuation compared to peers. The article suggests that now is a good time to buy Morgan Stanley shares, supported by its Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to Amazon.com, Inc. common stock, fully guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., with a maturity date of December 13, 2027. These notes offer contingent interest payments if the reference stock's closing price meets certain barriers and are subject to automatic call, but investors risk losing principal if conditions are not met. The article details the terms, risks, and tax implications of investing in these structured notes.

feed.title: LEGAL ALERT: Kaskela Law LLC Announces Investigation of Electronic Arts Inc. (EA) and Encourages EA Shareholders to Contact the Firm to Discuss Their Legal Rights and Options Before the Voting Deadline
feed.summary: Kaskela Law LLC has announced an investigation into the proposed buyout of Electronic Arts Inc. (EA) by an investor consortium, including Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund, at $210.00 per share. The firm is encouraging EA shareholders to contact them to discuss their legal rights and options, questioning whether the offer price is fair and if the company's officers and directors uphold their fiduciary duties. The investigation aims to determine the adequacy of the financial consideration for EA shareholders.

feed.title: Where Food Comes From, Inc. Partners with Pangea, Prime Pursuits, and Walmart to Launch CARE Certified Sustainable Leather Initiative
feed.summary: Where Food Comes From, Inc. (WFCF) has partnered with Pangea, Prime Pursuits, and Walmart to launch the "Transparency in Motion" initiative, introducing CARE Certified sustainable leather to automotive brands. This collaboration aims to enhance supply chain transparency and add value for beef producers by promoting verifiable sustainable practices and ethical sourcing. The initiative also seeks to reduce waste and create new market avenues for ranchers by utilizing leather as a natural byproduct of the beef industry.

feed.title: IDEX stock price target maintained at $200 by TD Cowen on growth outlook
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reiterated a Buy rating on IDEX Corp (NYSE:IEX) with a $200 price target, citing the company's strong growth outlook despite past challenges. The firm believes IDEX is undervalued, trading at discounted multiples compared to historical and peer valuations, and expects accelerating orders and revenues into 2027. This positive outlook is further supported by IDEX's robust Q3 2025 financial results and consistent dividend payments.

feed.title: Vertiv and Molina Healthcare have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
feed.summary: Zacks Equity Research highlights Vertiv Holdings (VRT) as the Bull of the Day due to its strong performance driven by AI and data center demand, ranking it a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy). Conversely, Molina Healthcare (MOH) is designated as the Bear of the Day, a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell), facing significant operational and financial pressures, including declining Medicaid enrollment and worsening profitability. The article also includes news about Goldman Sachs' acquisition of Innovator Capital Management to expand its ETF footprint.

feed.title: San Francisco sues 11 companies over health impacts of ultra-processed foods
feed.summary: San Francisco's city attorney, David Chiu, has initiated a lawsuit against 11 companies, including major players like Kraft-Heinz, General Mills, and Nestle. The lawsuit alleges that these companies use inexpensive ingredients, along with artificial flavors and colors, to create unhealthy and addictive ultra-processed food products. This marks the first government lawsuit of its kind addressing the health impacts of ultra-processed foods.
